---
title: "Innovation Economics Final"
description: "A study of the applications and shortcomings of intellecual property rights and their applications in the economy."
author: "Aidan Mistry"
date: "2026-04-24"
categories: [Research, Academic, Data Analysis]
---

## Assignment Reflection

For the final project in Innovation Economics we were tasked with writing a paper on a selection of four topics. I selected a topic relating to intellectual property (IP) rights and how they inlfuence creator incentives. The paper analysed the issues of free-riding, public vs private good and the terms and durations of IP righs protections.


---

## Project Documents

Below is the PDF document of my paper oultining the role of IP rights. Click the link below to view or download the full document:

* 📄 **[The Role of IP Rights in the Economy: Click here to view](data/The Role of IP Rights in the Economy.pdf)**
